data_description.api_server: Select your geographic region for optimal API performance. The corresponding API endpoint will be used automatically.
data_description.api_url: Auto-populated based on server selection. Only edit if using a custom API server.
data_description.enable_discover: Automatically discover all devices registered to your Imou account. Disable to manually enter a specific device ID instead.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Imou Life
reauth_confirm.description: Your Imou credentials have expired or are invalid. Please enter your App ID and App Secret to reauthenticate.

repair_stale_device.title: Device No Longer Available

data_description.action: Choose how to handle this device

error.not_connected: Action requested but not yet connected to the API
error.connection_failed: Failed to connect to the API
error.invalid_configuration: Invalid App Id or App Secret provided
error.not_authorized: Not authorized to operate on the device or invalid device id
error.custom_url_required: Custom URL is required when 'Custom' server is selected
error.rate_limit_exceeded: API rate limit exceeded. Please wait a few minutes before retrying, or enter your device ID manually below.
error.rate_limit_discovery: API rate limit exceeded. Please uncheck 'Enable Device Discovery' above and enter your device ID manually in the next step.

abort.reauth_successful: Reauthentication successful! Your credentials have been updated.
abort.device_removed: Device has been removed from Home Assistant.
abort.retrying: Retrying connection to device. The integration will reload.
abort.ignored: Warning ignored. The integration will continue trying to connect.

data.wait_after_wakeup: Wait after waking up dormant device (seconds)

data_description.battery_optimization: 🔋 Automatically optimize battery settings for maximum battery life. When enabled, the integration will adjust power mode, recording quality, and motion sensitivity based on battery level.
data_description.power_saving_mode: ⚡ Enable device power saving mode. Reduces power consumption by limiting certain features and functionality.
data_description.motion_sensitivity: Adjust motion detection sensitivity. Higher sensitivity detects smaller movements but may increase false alarms.
data_description.recording_quality: Video recording quality. Higher quality uses more storage and battery power.
data_description.led_indicators: Enable LED status indicators on the device. Disable to save battery.
data_description.auto_sleep: Automatically put device to sleep when inactive to conserve battery.
data_description.battery_threshold: Battery level (%) below which optimization features automatically activate.
